filesCreated.purpose: New CSS file for PostHero gradient, scoped to .post-hero .top-gradient to avoid cross-block conflicts. Copied from Hero.css .top-gradient rule.

filesModified.change: Removed 'hero' class from wrapper section. Changed 'post-hero hero relative overflow-visible' to 'post-hero relative overflow-visible'.
Removed 'hero' class from editor wrapper. Changed 'post-hero hero relative overflow-visible' to 'post-hero relative overflow-visible' in the cn() call inside useBlockProps().

warnings: react-hooks/exhaustive-deps in PostHero.tsx (pre-existing, not introduced by this change)
htmlStructureSync warning: false-positive due to InspectorControls as TSX root (pre-existing pattern across all blocks)

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP both updated to remove 'hero' class. Structure is identical.

testPage.notes: No test page content changes needed — this was a CSS/class-name fix only. Existing test page remains valid.

fixesApplied.description: Created blocks/PostHero/PostHero.css with .post-hero .top-gradient rule copied from Hero.css, scoped to prevent cross-block conflicts.
Removed 'hero' class from PostHero.php wrapper (line 28). PostHero no longer depends on Hero.css for gradient styling.
Removed 'hero' class from PostHero.tsx useBlockProps className (line 115). TSX and PHP are in sync.

impactNotes.heroBlock: No impact. Hero.css and Hero.js remain unchanged.
impactNotes.eventHeroBlock: No impact. EventHero still has its own 'hero' class dependency (separate concern).
impactNotes.postHeroJs: No impact. PostHero.js already targeted '.post-hero .top-gradient', not '.hero .top-gradient'.
impactNotes.buildSystem: PostHero.css is automatically discovered by the webpack glob — no manual registration needed.
